cases.goal: use a local tool and then finish

env.ORCHESTRO_SUBPROCESS_COMMAND: bash -lc 'if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "Tool step"; then printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"done after tool\"}"; else printf "{\"action\":\"tool\",\"tool\":\"pwd\",\"argument\":\"\"}"; fi'
bash -lc 'flag=.orchestro/bench-reflect-flag; if [ ! -f "$flag" ]; then mkdir -p .orchestro; touch "$flag"; printf fail >&2; exit 1; else rm -f "$flag"; printf recovered; fi'
